FirstName, Lastinitial <!--Lastname--> (Separationdate)

# Instructions
## SERF Submitted
- Check the excel sheet that HR sends if the separated employees accounts are disabled. 
- If a SERF request has been submitted. 
When disabling the users account fill out the `Description` field with:

`Disabled Account - Reason for separation (Resigned, Terminated, or Retired). - your initials - TPW Amin`

## SERF Not submitted
- If the account is still enabled and a SERF has not been submitted, 
- Disable the account fill out the `Description` field
- Ask the supervisor to Submit a SERF request
